title: GW170817 / vestigial-graviton
stage13_round1_summary: Round-1 Stage-13 surfaced 6 BLOCKERs + 2 REQUIRED. All 6 BLOCKERs remediated (1.1 Volovik2024 page+title; 1.2 Volovik2022 vol+page+title; 1.3 Roehm2026LinearizedEFE fabricated title→actual paper23 title + inprep=True; 3.1 second_sound_graviton_not_derived_DOF→natural_range_disjoint_from_ligo_window cascade; 3.2 H_VestigialModeIsGraviton P3→P3' = |Δ|<1/2 cascade + 4th falsifier _fails_at_quarter; 5.1 reproducibility 17→21 theorems and lemmas; 5.2 falsifier-count 3→4). 1 REQUIRED accepted-with-rationale (7.1 inline count literals → verifiable raw counts; macro-binding deferred to project-wide pass). 1 REQUIRED OPEN (2.1 chi_vest_natural_lower/upper provenance human-verify — user-action-only via provenance dashboard; submission-readiness gate, not bundle-state gate). Cascade: paper25_gravitational_waves was carrying stale Lean references from the 2026-04-25 post-Wave-2 strengthening; updated paper25 in lockstep. 9 supersession ledger entries appended. LaTeX clean: 3-page PDF, 0 undefined refs/citations.
notes: Phase 7b sub-wave 7b.0 round-1 fixes applied 2026-05-01. Source-paper drift (paper25 stale Lean refs from 2026-04-25 strengthening pass + count drift) caught and remediated in lockstep with L1. Open advisory: 2.1 ParameterProvenance chi_vest natural-range bounds need user human-verification via provenance dashboard before submission. Stage 13 round-2 dispatched after fixes.
